title: MTV API Tests Provider Configuration
description: Provider configuration for MTV migration test suites. Each top-level key is a provider name, and its value defines connection details, credentials, and provider-specific settings.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URI for editor validation.

guestCredentials.description: Guest VM credentials for post-migration validation (SSH/WinRM access).

guest_vm_linux_user.description: SSH username for Linux guest VMs (e.g. 'root').

guest_vm_linux_password.description: SSH password for Linux guest VMs.

guest_vm_win_user.description: WinRM username for Windows guest VMs (e.g. 'Administrator').

guest_vm_win_password.description: WinRM password for Windows guest VMs.

copyoffloadConfig.description: Copy-offload (XCOPY) configuration for hardware-accelerated migration via storage array APIs.

storage_vendor_product.description: Storage array vendor/product type used for XCOPY offload.

datastore_id.description: vSphere managed object ID of the primary XCOPY-capable datastore (e.g. 'datastore-79826').

default_vm_name.description: Name of the default template VM used for copy-offload test cloning.

storage_hostname.description: Hostname or IP address of the storage array management interface.

storage_username.description: Username for authenticating with the storage array API.

storage_password.description: Password for authenticating with the storage array API.

secondary_datastore_id.description: vSphere managed object ID of a secondary XCOPY-capable datastore for multi-datastore tests.

non_xcopy_datastore_id.description: vSphere managed object ID of a datastore that does NOT support XCOPY, used for fallback/negative tests.

storage_secret_extra.description: Additional key-value pairs to include in the storage Secret resource for vendor-specific configuration.

esxi_clone_method.description: Method used to clone VMs on ESXi hosts: 'vib' uses a VIB package, 'ssh' uses direct SSH commands.

esxi_host.description: Hostname or IP address of the ESXi host used for copy-offload cloning operations.

esxi_user.description: SSH username for the ESXi host.

esxi_password.description: SSH password for the ESXi host.

rdm_lun_uuid.description: NAA-format UUID of a Raw Device Mapping (RDM) LUN for RDM migration tests (e.g. 'naa.600a098038313954...').

resource_pool.description: vSphere resource pool for VM placement during cloning operations.

ontap_svm.description: NetApp ONTAP Storage Virtual Machine (SVM/vServer) name.

vantara_storage_id.description: Hitachi Vantara storage array serial number.

vantara_storage_port.description: Hitachi Vantara storage management API port.

vantara_hostgroup_id_list.description: Hitachi Vantara host group ID list in 'port,id' format (e.g. 'CL1-A,1:CL2-B,2').

pure_cluster_prefix.description: Pure Storage FlashArray cluster prefix identifier (e.g. 'px_...').

providerDefinition.description: A source provider configuration defining connection, authentication, and provider-specific settings.

oneOf.description: vSphere provider: supports vCenter and direct ESXi connections with optional VDDK, copy-offload, and LUKS support.

type.description: Provider type determining the virtualization platform.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name or IP address of the provider endpoint.

api_url.description: Full API URL for provider communication (e.g. 'https://vcenter.example.com/sdk').

username.description: Username for authenticating with the provider API.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the provider API.

endpoint_type.description: vSphere endpoint type: 'vcenter' for vCenter Server, 'esxi' for direct ESXi host connection.

vddk_init_image.description: Container image reference for the VDDK init container used during vSphere migrations (e.g. 'quay.io/rh-openshift-mtv/vddk-init-image:8.0.1').

clone_provider.description: Name of a vCenter provider entry (key in this config) used for ESXi cloning when endpoint_type is 'esxi'.

luks_passphrase.description: LUKS encryption passphrase for decrypting encrypted VM disks during migration.

oneOf.description: oVirt/RHV provider: Red Hat Virtualization with guest credential support.

type.description: Provider type determining the virtualization platform.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name or IP address of the provider endpoint.

api_url.description: Full API URL for provider communication.

username.description: Username for authenticating with the provider API.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the provider API.

oneOf.description: OpenStack provider: requires Keystone domain, region, and project configuration.

type.description: Provider type determining the virtualization platform.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name or IP address of the provider endpoint.

api_url.description: Full API URL for provider communication.

username.description: Username for authenticating with the provider API.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the provider API.

project_name.description: OpenStack project/tenant name for scoping API requests.

oneOf.description: OpenShift provider: migration target cluster with storage class and optional SSL configuration.

type.description: Provider type determining the virtualization platform.

host.description: OpenShift cluster API hostname or URL.

api_url.description: Full API URL for provider communication.

username.description: Username for authenticating with the provider API.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the provider API.

storage_class.description: Default storage class for migration target PVCs.

ca_bundle.description: Path to CA bundle file for SSL verification.

oneOf.description: OVA provider: file-based VM import with optional guest credentials.

type.description: Provider type determining the virtualization platform.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name or IP address of the provider endpoint.

api_url.description: Full API URL for provider communication (e.g. NFS path for OVA).

username.description: Username for authenticating with the provider API.

password.description: Password for authenticating with the provider API.
